prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 13925→10819→9459→8791→31136，2021–2024 年呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小），但 2025 年因新高考选科分组（再选不限组）导致最低位次大幅后移至约 31136 名；2025 年再选化学组实际位次约 10642 名，与往年可比口径基本持平；本省理科/物理类计划 2021–2023 年均为 68 人，2024 年增至 72 人，2025 年增至 76 人；2026 年计划 85 人，较 2025 年扩招约 11.8%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 84 名，近年排名稳定在 75–84 区间，属中上水平理工类院校；2026 年声誉文件中无该校负面或正面事件记录，近年亦无明显投档断档或舆情波动，声誉整体平稳；抖音热度未进入总排名前 106 名，关注度一般；电气工程学科评估 A（全国前列），动力工程及工程热物理 A-；电气工程及其自动化是该校王牌专业，与电力行业深度绑定，就业质量高，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化 2024 年专业热度评为「高热推荐」，能源动力类评为「推荐」，计算机类、电子信息类均为推荐方向，相关专业报考热度持续升温；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 206500 人，较 2025 年 172468 人增加约 19.7%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；该校位于河北省保定市，非本省高校，在陕西省招生占比约 1.4%–1.8%，属跨省招生，无本省倾斜效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年新高考分组后最低位次大幅后移至 31136 名的基准、2026 年扩招约 11.8% 的缓解效应、以及本省物理类考生增长约 19.7% 带来的竞争加剧，预计 2026 年最低录取位次在 31136 名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约 33398 名，区间 32898–33898 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 13925→10819→9459→8791→31136. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), but in 2025, due to the new Gaokao subject grouping (no re-selection requirement group), the minimum ranking significantly dropped to about 31136. In 2025, the actual ranking for the re-selection chemistry group was about 10642, roughly the same as previous years. The provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 68 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 72 in 2024, and to 76 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 85 students, an increase of about 11.8% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and may alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 75–84 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions. The 2026 reputation file contains no negative or positive events for this school, and there have been no significant admission gaps or public opinion fluctuations in recent years, with overall reputation stable. Douyin popularity did not enter the top 106 overall rankings, indicating average attention. Electrical Engineering discipline is rated A (top in the country), Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is rated A-. Electrical Engineering and Automation is the school's flagship major, deeply tied to the power industry, with high employment quality, attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Electrical Engineering and Automation was rated as 'High Heat Recommended', Energy and Power Engineering as 'Recommended', and Computer Science, Electronic Information as recommended directions, with related majors' application popularity continuing to heat up. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in this province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, a significant growth in examinee numbers, intensifying competition. The school is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, not a provincial university, with enrollment in Shaanxi accounting for about 1.4%–1.8%, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no provincial bias effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline of the minimum ranking significantly dropping to 31136 after the 2025 new Gaokao grouping, the mitigating effect of an approximately 11.8% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a 19.7% increase in provincial Physics Category examinees, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to drop from 31136. The predicted minimum ranking is about 33398, with a range of 32898–33898.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 32898–33898, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 32000), you can focus on aiming for A-level discipline majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., after 33800), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower rankings, such as Energy and Power majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 3697→3700→3652→3777→4062. Over the past five years, the ranking fluctuated narrowly within the 3650–4060 range. In 2025, it shifted back by about 285 places compared to 2024, showing a slight backward trend. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 11 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 7 in 2025, and maintained at 7 in 2026, a reduction of about 36% compared to 2024 and earlier. The plan for 2025–2026 remains unchanged.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it in the upper-middle tier of science and engineering institutions. Liberal arts majors are not its traditional strengths. In 2026, there are no records of negative or positive events concerning the university in reputation documents, and its reputation has been stable in recent years. Its Douyin popularity did not enter the top 106 overall rankings, indicating moderate attention in the liberal arts direction. Its advantageous disciplines are concentrated in Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-), both in science and engineering. The liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Foreign Languages and Literature, Administrative Management, Social Work) lack corresponding A-level discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the Law major is rated as 'divergent observation,' foreign language majors as 'general observation,' and the overall popularity of liberal arts is stable. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is about 88,500, an increase of about 17% from 75,641 in 2025, indicating significant growth in the examinee pool and increased competitive pressure. The university is located in Baoding, Hebei Province, not in the home province. Its liberal arts enrollment in Shaanxi is very small (about 0.2%–0.3%), making it cross-provincial enrollment without any local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline minimum ranking of 4062 in 2025, the enrollment plan remaining unchanged at 7 in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a 17% increase in history category examinees in the province, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward from 4062. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4092, with a range of 3592–4592.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 3592–4592, the university offers only 4 liberal arts majors (Law, Foreign Languages, Administrative Management, Social Work). It is recommended to prioritize Law and Foreign Languages as main choices (Tier 1/Tier 2), with Social Work as a safety option. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 3600), you can aim for Law. If your ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., after 4500), it is advisable to use Social Work as a safety and also consider liberal arts majors at other institutions.
